---
title: "huimori_1.5_feature_engineering_ERA5"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: show
    code-summary: "코드 보기"
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: true
    df-print: paged
    page-layout: full
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(data.table)
library(collapse)
library(terra)
library(ncdf4)
library(httr)
library(exactextractr)
library(huimori)
library(readxl)
library(arrow)
library(sfarrow)
library(stringi)
library(plyr)
library(chopin)
library(geosphere)
library(tidymodels)
library(spatialsample)
library(finetune)
library(vip)
library(timeDate)

library(future)
library(future.apply)
library(future.mirai)

save_path <- "~/huimori/daehoon/processed_files"
if (!dir.exists(save_path)) {dir.create(save_path, recursive = TRUE)}
```

# 1

```{r}
# 1. chr_dir_data 설정
if (Sys.getenv("USER") %in% c("isong", "songlab", "dhnyu")) {
  chr_dir_data <- file.path("/mnt/hdd001", "Korea")
} else {
  chr_dir_data <- file.path(Sys.getenv("HOME"), "Documents")
}

# 2. chr_dir_git 설정
if (Sys.getenv("USER") == "isong") {
  chr_dir_git <- file.path(Sys.getenv("HOME"), "GitHub", "histmap-ko")
} else if (Sys.getenv("USER") == "songlab") {
  chr_dir_git <- file.path("/members", "songlab", "GitHub", "histmap-ko")
} else if (Sys.getenv("USER") == "felix") {
  chr_dir_git <- file.path(Sys.getenv("HOME"), "GitHub", "histmap-ko")
} else {
  chr_dir_git <- file.path(Sys.getenv("HOME"), "histmap-ko")
}

# 3. chr_date_range 설정
chr_date_range <- c(as.Date("2015-01-01"), as.Date("2023-12-31"))

# 4. int_years_spatial 설정
int_years_spatial <- seq(2015, 2023, 1)

# 5. chr_months_spatial 설정
chr_months_spatial <- seq(from = chr_date_range[1], to = chr_date_range[2], by = "month") |> 
  format("%Y-%m")
```


# 2



```{r}
## B01. Monitor table
chr_monitors_file <- file.path(chr_dir_git, "data/sites", "sites_history_cleaning_20250311.xlsx")

## B02. Measurement data
chr_measurement_dir <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "airquality", "outdoor")
chr_measurement_file <- file.path(chr_measurement_dir, "sites_airkorea_2010_2023_spt_yd.parquet")

## B03. Landuse data
glc_dir <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "landuse", "glc_fcs30d")
yrs <- unlist(int_years_spatial)
yrs <- yrs - 1L
yrs_pattern <- paste0(yrs, collapse = "|")
chr_landuse_files <- list.files(glc_dir, pattern = paste0("(", yrs_pattern, ")", "\\.tif$"), full.names = TRUE)

## B04. DEM data
chr_dem_file <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "elevation", "kngii_2022_merged_res30d.tif")

## B05. DSM data
chr_dsm_file <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "elevation", "copernicus_korea_30m.tif")

## B06. Road network data
chr_road_files <- list.files(
  file.path(chr_dir_data, "transportation", "nodelink", "data"),
  pattern = "MOCT_LINK.shp$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

## B07. ASOS weather data
chr_asos_file <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "weather", "data", "asos_2010_2023.parquet")
chr_asos_site_file <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "weather", "data", "asos_sites.xlsx")

## B08. Boundary Data
geodata::geodata_path(file.path("~", "geodatacache"))
sf_korea_all <- geodata::gadm(country = "KOR", level = 0) %>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  sf::st_transform("EPSG:5179")

## B09. Watershed
chr_korea_watershed <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "watersheds", "data", "watershed-korea.gpkg")

## B10. MTPI
chr_mtpi_file <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "elevation", "kngii_90m_mtpi.tif")

# MTPI 1km 생성 및 파일 경로 저장
mtpi <- terra::rast(chr_mtpi_file)
mtpi_1km <- terra::aggregate(mtpi, fact = 11, fun = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
chr_mtpi_1km_file <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "elevation", "kngii_1km_mtpi.tif")
terra::writeRaster(mtpi_1km, chr_mtpi_1km_file, overwrite = TRUE)

## B10-1. Preprocessed landuse fraction files
chr_landuse_freq_file <- sapply(chr_landuse_files, function(f) {
  year <- stringi::stri_extract_first_regex(f, pattern = "20[0-2][0-9]")
  year <- as.integer(year)
  year_file_name <- sprintf("glc_freq_%d.tif", year)
  file.path(chr_dir_data, "landuse", year_file_name)
}, USE.NAMES = FALSE)

## B11. Emission locations
chr_file_emission_locs <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "emission", "data", "emission_location.gpkg")
chr_dir_aod <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "airquality", "aod")

## B12. ERA5
chr_dir_climate <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "climate")
chr_dir_era5_land <- file.path(chr_dir_climate, "ERA5_Land")
chr_dir_era5_blh <- file.path(chr_dir_climate, "ERA5_BLH")

## B13. CHELSA
chr_dir_chelsa <- file.path(chr_dir_climate, "Chelsa")
```

# 3

```{r}
## 1. dt_measurements ####
dt_measurements <- {
  # chr_measurement_file 경로가 사전에 정의되어 있어야 함
  dt <- data.table::as.data.table(nanoparquet::read_parquet(chr_measurement_file))
  
  # 시간 밀림 보정 (9시간 가산)
  dt[, datehour := datehour + lubridate::hours(9)]
  dt[, date := data.table::as.IDate(date + lubridate::hours(9))]
  
  # 음수값(-999)은 일괄적으로 결측치(NA) 처리
  cols_to_fix <- c("SO2", "CO", "O3", "NO2", "PM10", "PM25")
  dt[, (cols_to_fix) := lapply(.SD, function(x) ifelse(x < 0, NA, x)), 
     .SDcols = cols_to_fix]
  dt
}

## 2. sf_monitors_base ####
sf_monitors_base <- {
  # chr_monitors_file 및 fill_date 함수가 사전에 정의되어 있어야 함
  sites <- readxl::read_excel(chr_monitors_file)

  sites_c <- sites |>
    dplyr::filter(!grepl("(광화학|중금속|산성|유해)", site_type)) |>
    dplyr::arrange(TMSID, site_type, year) |>
    dplyr::filter(!grepl("\\-[1-9]$", TMSID)) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::group_by(TMSID, site_type) |>
    dplyr::mutate(year_max = max(year)) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      TMSID, date_start, date_end, coords_google, floor,
      .keep_all = TRUE
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      date_start = as.POSIXct(date_start, tz = "Asia/Seoul"),
      date_end = as.POSIXct(date_end, tz = "Asia/Seoul")
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(TMSID) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      date_start = replace(date_start, dplyr::row_number() == 1, unique(fill_date(date_start, min(year), TRUE))),
      date_end = replace(date_end, dplyr::row_number() == dplyr::n(), unique(fill_date(date_end, max(year_max), start = FALSE)))
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      date_start = ifelse(dplyr::n() == 1 & is.na(date_start), as.POSIXct(sprintf("%d0101000000", year), format = "%Y%m%d%H%M%S", tz = "Asia/Seoul"), date_start),
      date_end = ifelse(dplyr::n() == 1 & is.na(date_end), as.POSIXct(sprintf("%d1231230000", year_max), format = "%Y%m%d%H%M%S", tz = "Asia/Seoul"), date_end)
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!(is.na(date_start) & is.na(date_end))) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      date_end = ifelse(is.na(date_end), dplyr::lead(date_end), date_end)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(date_start)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      date_start = as.POSIXct(date_start, tz = "Asia/Seoul"),
      date_end = as.POSIXct(date_end, tz = "Asia/Seoul")
    )

  check_lookup <- c("[도시대기측정망]", "[도로변대기측정망]", "[PM2.5성분측정망]", "[교외대기측정망]",
                    "[항만측정망]", "[국가배경농도(도서)측정망]", "[대기오염집중측정망]")
  target_lookup <- c("Urban", "Roadside", "PM2.5", "Suburban", "Port", "Island", "Concentrated")

  sites_ch <- sites_c |>
    dplyr::select(TMSID, site_type, dplyr::starts_with("date_"), dplyr::starts_with("coords_google")) |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      lon = as.numeric(stringi::stri_split_fixed(coords_google, pattern = ", ")[[1]][2]),
      lat = as.numeric(stringi::stri_split_fixed(coords_google, pattern = ", ")[[1]][1])
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      site_type = sub(" ", "", site_type),
      site_type = plyr::mapvalues(site_type, check_lookup, target_lookup),
      site_type = factor(site_type, levels = target_lookup[c(1, 2, 4, 5, 3, 6, 7)])
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(TMSID) |>
    dplyr::mutate(TMSID2 = paste0(TMSID, LETTERS[seq_len(length(TMSID))])) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  sites_ch
}

## 3. sf_monitors_correct ####
sf_monitors_correct <- {
  ak_sites_annual <- huimori::summarize_annual(
    data = dt_measurements,
    timeflag = "date"
  )

  sites_cfd <- sf_monitors_base |>
    dplyr::arrange(TMSID, date_start) |>
    dplyr::group_by(TMSID) |>
    dplyr::mutate(lon2 = lag(lon), lat2 = lag(lat)) |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(dist_m = geosphere::distGeo(c(lon, lat), c(lon2, lat2))) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  sites_fullrange <- sites_cfd %>%
    dplyr::group_by(TMSID, TMSID2) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(date_start) & !is.na(date_end)) %>%
    tidyr::nest() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      year_all = purrr::map(data, function(df) {
        ystart <- lubridate::year(df$date_start)
        yend   <- lubridate::year(df$date_end)
        data.frame(year = seq(ystart, yend))
      })
    ) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(c(year_all, data)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  sites_sf <- sites_fullrange |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(lon)) |>
    sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326) |>
    sf::st_transform(5179) |>
    dplyr::full_join(ak_sites_annual, by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year")) |>
    dplyr::filter(!sf::st_is_empty(geometry))
  
  sites_sf
}


qs::qsave(
  sf_monitors_correct, 
  file.path(save_path, "sf_monitors_correct.qs"), 
  nthreads = 12
)
# sf_monitors_correct <- qs::qread(
#   file.path(save_path, "sf_monitors_correct.qs"), 
#   nthreads = 12
# )


## 4. sf_monitors_correct_yr (Branched by year) ####
# int_years_spatial 벡터가 사전에 정의되어 있어야 함
sf_monitors_correct_yr <- lapply(int_years_spatial, function(yr) {
  sf_monitors_correct |>
    dplyr::filter(year == yr)
})
names(sf_monitors_correct_yr) <- int_years_spatial
```

### AOD, BLH

```{r}
## 1. int_aod_year_chunks ####
# chr_date_range 변수가 정의되어 있어야 함
int_aod_year_chunks <- {
  yrs <- strftime(chr_date_range, "%Y") |> as.integer()
  seq(yrs[1], yrs[2], by = 1)
}

## 2. rast_year_aod (연도별 AOD 정렬 및 연간 중앙값 생성) ####
# chr_dir_aod, chr_dir_data 변수가 정의되어 있어야 함
rast_year_aod <- lapply(int_aod_year_chunks, function(year_i) {
  
  # 1. 저장될 파일 경로 정의
  aod_yr_dir <- file.path(chr_dir_data, "aerosol")
  aod_yr_file <- file.path(aod_yr_dir, paste0("aod_yearly_", year_i, ".tif"))
  
  # 2. 기존 파일이 있으면 즉시 경로 반환 (계산 건너뜀)
  if (file.exists(aod_yr_file)) {
    message(paste0("Skip: File already exists for year ", year_i))
    return(aod_yr_file)
  }

  # 3. 파일 리스트 확보
  chr_year_aod_files <- list.files(
    pattern = paste0("MCD19A2_Daily_Composite_", year_i, "[0-9]{3,3}.tif$"),
    path = chr_dir_aod,
    full.names = TRUE,
    recursive = TRUE
  )
  
  if (length(chr_year_aod_files) == 0) return(NULL)

  # 4. 래스터 로드 및 정렬 (파일이 없을 때만 수행)
  r_list <- lapply(chr_year_aod_files, terra::rast)
  template <- r_list[[1]]

  aligned_list <- lapply(r_list, function(r) {
    if (terra::ext(r) == terra::ext(template)) {
      return(r)
    } else {
      r_extended <- terra::extend(r, template)
      return(terra::crop(r_extended, template))
    }
  })

  # 5. 스택 생성 및 연간 중앙값 계산
  aod_ras <- terra::rast(aligned_list)
  aod_yr  <- terra::app(aod_ras, fun = function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))

  # 6. 저장 경로 생성 및 파일 쓰기
  if (!dir.exists(aod_yr_dir)) dir.create(aod_yr_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  terra::writeRaster(aod_yr, filename = aod_yr_file, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  return(aod_yr_file)
})
names(rast_year_aod) <- int_aod_year_chunks

## 3. df_feat_correct_year_aod (지점별 AOD 추출) ####
# sf_monitors_correct_yr(리스트)이 정의되어 있어야 함
df_feat_correct_year_aod <- lapply(seq_along(int_aod_year_chunks), function(i) {
  
  year_i     <- int_aod_year_chunks[i]
  aod_file   <- rast_year_aod[[i]]
  sf_yr_data <- sf_monitors_correct_yr[[i]]
  
  if (is.null(aod_file) || !file.exists(aod_file)) return(NULL)

  # 래스터 로드
  aod_ras <- terra::rast(aod_file)
  crs_ras <- terra::crs(aod_ras)
  
  # 지점 버퍼 생성
  sf_monitors_correct_buff <- sf_yr_data |>
    sf::st_transform(crs_ras) |>
    sf::st_buffer(dist = 0.001, nQuadSegs = 90L)

  # 값 추출
  extracted <- exactextractr::exact_extract(
    x = aod_ras,
    y = sf_monitors_correct_buff,
    fun = "mean",
    weights = NULL,
    force_df = TRUE,
    append_cols = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year")
  ) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    TMSID = TMSID,
    TMSID2 = TMSID2,
    year = year,
    aod = ifelse(is.nan(mean), 0L, mean)
  )
  
  return(extracted)
})

## 1. rast_era5_blh (연도별 BLH 중앙값 래스터 생성) ####
rast_era5_blh <- lapply(int_aod_year_chunks, function(year_i) {
  
  # 저장 경로 설정 및 디렉터리 생성
  blh_yr_dir <- file.path(chr_dir_climate, "ERA5_BLH_processed")
  if (!dir.exists(blh_yr_dir)) dir.create(blh_yr_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  blh_yr_file <- file.path(blh_yr_dir, paste0("era5_blh_yearly_", year_i, ".tif"))
  
  # [수정] 파일이 이미 존재하면 연산을 건너뛰고 경로만 반환
  if (file.exists(blh_yr_file)) {
    message(paste0("Existing file found for year ", year_i, ". Skipping computation."))
    return(blh_yr_file)
  }

  # 해당 연도의 .nc 파일 리스트 확보
  chr_year_blh_files <- list.files(
    pattern = paste0("ERA5_BLH_", year_i, "_[0-9]{2,2}.nc$"),
    path = chr_dir_era5_blh,
    full.names = TRUE,
    recursive = TRUE
  )
  
  if (length(chr_year_blh_files) == 0) {
    warning(paste0("No .nc files found for year ", year_i))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # 래스터 로드 및 시간축 기준 중앙값 계산
  blh_ras <- terra::rast(chr_year_blh_files)
  blh_yr  <- terra::app(blh_ras, fun = "median")

  # 파일 쓰기
  terra::writeRaster(
    blh_yr,
    filename = blh_yr_file,
    overwrite = TRUE
  )
  
  return(blh_yr_file)
})
names(rast_era5_blh) <- int_aod_year_chunks


## 2. df_feat_correct_blh (모니터링 지점별 BLH 값 추출) ####
df_feat_correct_blh <- lapply(seq_along(int_aod_year_chunks), function(i) {
  
  year_i    <- int_aod_year_chunks[i]
  blh_file  <- rast_era5_blh[[i]]
  sf_yr_data <- sf_monitors_correct_yr[[i]]
  
  # 파일 존재 여부 재확인
  if (is.null(blh_file) || !file.exists(blh_file)) {
    message(paste0("No raster available for year ", year_i))
    return(NULL)
  }

  blh_ras <- terra::rast(blh_file)
  crs_ras <- terra::crs(blh_ras)
  
  sf_monitors_correct_buff <- sf_yr_data |>
    sf::st_transform(crs_ras) |>
    sf::st_buffer(dist = 0.00001, nQuadSegs = 90L)

  extracted <- exactextractr::exact_extract(
    x = blh_ras,
    y = sf_monitors_correct_buff,
    fun = "mean",
    weights = NULL,
    force_df = TRUE,
    append_cols = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year")
  ) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    TMSID = TMSID,
    TMSID2 = TMSID2,
    year = year,
    blh = ifelse(is.nan(mean), 0L, mean)
  )
  
  return(extracted)
})
```

### dsm, dem, mtpi, mtpi_1km

```{r}
## 1. df_feat_correct_dsm ####
df_feat_correct_dsm <- lapply(sf_monitors_correct_yr, function(sf_yr) {
  chopin::extract_at(
    x = chr_dsm_file,
    y = sf_yr,
    radius = 1e-6,
    id = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year"),
    force_df = TRUE
  ) |>
    dplyr::rename(dsm = mean)
})

## 2. df_feat_correct_dem ####
df_feat_correct_dem <- lapply(sf_monitors_correct_yr, function(sf_yr) {
  chopin::extract_at(
    x = chr_dem_file,
    y = sf_yr,
    radius = 1e-6,
    id = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year"),
    force_df = TRUE
  ) |>
    dplyr::rename(dem = mean)
})

## 3. df_feat_correct_mtpi ####
df_feat_correct_mtpi <- lapply(sf_monitors_correct_yr, function(sf_yr) {
  # 루프 효율을 위해 래스터 로드는 내부에서 수행
  mtpi_ras <- terra::rast(chr_mtpi_file)
  chopin::extract_at(
    x = mtpi_ras,
    y = sf_yr,
    radius = 1e-6,
    id = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year"),
    force_df = TRUE
  ) |>
    dplyr::rename(mtpi = mean)
})

## 4. df_feat_correct_mtpi_1km ####
df_feat_correct_mtpi_1km <- lapply(sf_monitors_correct_yr, function(sf_yr) {
  mtpi_ras <- terra::rast(chr_mtpi_1km_file)
  chopin::extract_at(
    x = mtpi_ras,
    y = sf_yr,
    radius = 1e-6,
    id = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year"),
    force_df = TRUE
  ) |>
    dplyr::rename(mtpi_1km = mean)
})
```

### emittors, d_road

```{r}
## 1. sf_emission_locs (배출원 위치 데이터 로드) ####
# chr_file_emission_locs 변수가 정의되어 있어야 함
sf_emission_locs <- {
  sf::st_read(chr_file_emission_locs, quiet = TRUE) |>
    sf::st_transform(5179) |>
    dplyr::filter(영업상태구분코드 == "01")
}

## 2. sf_korea_watershed (유역 경계 데이터 로드) ####
# chr_korea_watershed 변수가 정의되어 있어야 함
sf_korea_watershed <- {
  sf::st_read(chr_korea_watershed, quiet = TRUE) |>
    sf::st_transform(5179)
}

## 3. df_feat_correct_emittors (지리적 가중 배출량 계산) ####
# sf_monitors_correct_yr 리스트를 순회하며 계산
df_feat_correct_emittors <- lapply(sf_monitors_correct_yr, function(sf_yr) {
  result <- huimori::gw_emittors(
    input = sf_yr,
    target = sf_emission_locs,
    clip = sf_korea_watershed,
    wfun = "gaussian",
    bw = 2000,
    dist_method = "geodesic"
  ) |>
    dplyr::select(1, 2, year, 3, PM10, PM25, gw_emission)
  
  return(result)
})

## 4. df_feat_correct_d_road (최단 도로 거리 계산) ####
# chr_road_files 변수가 정의되어 있어야 함
df_feat_correct_d_road <- lapply(sf_monitors_correct_yr, function(sf_yr) {
  # 도로 데이터 로드 (마지막 파일 기준)
  road <- sf::st_read(chr_road_files[length(chr_road_files)], quiet = TRUE)
  road <- sf::st_transform(road, sf::st_crs(sf_yr))
  
  # 도로 필터링 (특정 도로 유형 제외 및 실제 사용 도로)
  road <- road %>%
    dplyr::filter(!ROAD_TYPE %in% c("002", "004") & ROAD_USE == 0)
  
  # 최단 인접 피처 인덱스 탐색
  nearest_idx <- sf::st_nearest_feature(
    x = sf_yr,
    y = road
  )
  
  # 인접 도로 추출 및 거리 계산
  road_nearest <- road[nearest_idx, ]
  dist_road_nearest <- sf::st_distance(
    x = sf_yr,
    y = road_nearest,
    by_element = TRUE
  )
  
  # 결과 데이터 프레임 구성
  sf_monitors_dist_att <- sf_yr |>
    dplyr::select(TMSID, TMSID2, year) |>
    dplyr::mutate(d_road = dist_road_nearest) |>
    sf::st_drop_geometry()
  
  return(sf_monitors_dist_att)
})
```

### Landuse

```{r}
## [1] 병렬 처리 환경 설정 ####
# 12개의 워커를 사용하는 mirai_multisession 설정
int_landuse_radius <- c(30, 100, 500, 2000)

plan(mirai_multisession, workers = 12)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 16000 * 1024^2)

df_feat_correct_landuse_agg <- future_lapply(seq_along(sf_monitors_correct_yr), function(i) {

  sf_yr <- sf_monitors_correct_yr[[i]]
  ras_path <- chr_landuse_files[i]

  landuse_ras <- terra::rast(ras_path)

  yr_radius_results <- lapply(int_landuse_radius, function(rad) {
    df_extract <- chopin::extract_at(
      x = landuse_ras,
      y = sf_yr,
      radius = rad,
      id = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year"),
      func = "frac",
      force_df = TRUE
    )

    df_extract |>
      dplyr::rename_with(
        .cols = dplyr::contains("frac"),
        .fn = ~ paste0("landuse_", ., "_", rad)
      )
  })

  res_merged <- Reduce(
    function(x, y) collapse::join(x, y, on = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year")), 
    yr_radius_results
  )
  
  return(res_merged)
  
}, future.packages = c("terra", "chopin", "dplyr", "collapse"))

plan(sequential)
```

### merged

```{r}
df_feat_correct_merged <- lapply(seq_along(sf_monitors_correct_yr), function(i) {

  current_year_list <- list(
    sf_monitors_correct_yr[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_d_road[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_dem[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_dsm[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_emittors[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_landuse_agg[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_mtpi[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_mtpi_1km[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_year_aod[[i]],
    df_feat_correct_blh[[i]]
  )

  df_res <- purrr::reduce(
    current_year_list,
    .f = collapse::join,
    on = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year")
  )

  df_res <- df_res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      d_road = as.numeric(d_road) / 1000,
      dsm    = as.numeric(dsm),
      dem    = as.numeric(dem),
      mtpi   = as.numeric(mtpi)
    ) %>%
    sf::st_drop_geometry()

  names(df_res) <- sub("mean.", "", names(df_res))

  df_res <- df_res %>%
    dplyr::relocate(
      any_of(c("year", "ndays", "PM10", "PM25")), 
      .after = TMSID2
    )
  
  return(df_res)
})

qs::qsave(
  df_feat_correct_merged, 
  file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_merged.qs"), 
  nthreads = 12
)
# df_feat_correct_merged <- qs::qread(
#   file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_merged.qs"), 
#   nthreads = 12
# )
```

# 3.1

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(lubridate)
library(geosphere)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(huimori)

# 1. 일별 농도 집계 (Hourly -> Daily)
ak_sites_daily <- huimori::summarize_daily(
  data = dt_measurements, 
  timeflag = "date"
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(date = date_s) %>% # date_s를 date로 변경
  dplyr::mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    TMSID = as.character(TMSID),   # Join을 위해 character로 변환
    TMSID2 = as.character(TMSID2)
  )

# 2. 지점 이동 거리 계산 (Relocation Distance) - 원본 로직 유지
sites_cfd <- sf_monitors_base |>
  dplyr::arrange(TMSID, date_start) |>
  dplyr::group_by(TMSID) |>
  dplyr::mutate(lon2 = lag(lon), lat2 = lag(lat)) |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(dist_m = geosphere::distGeo(c(lon, lat), c(lon2, lat2))) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

# 3. 시공간 범위 확장 (Unique Space-Time by Days)
# 기존 연도별 확장(seq(ystart, yend))을 일별 확장(seq(dstart, dend))으로 변경
sites_fullrange_daily <- sites_cfd %>%
  dplyr::group_by(TMSID, TMSID2) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(date_start) & 
    !is.na(date_end) & 
    as.Date(date_start) <= as.Date(date_end) # 3개 지점 여기서 필터링됨
  ) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    date_all = purrr::map(data, function(df) {
      dstart <- as.Date(df$date_start)
      dend   <- as.Date(df$date_end)
      # 운영 기간 내 모든 날짜 생성
      data.frame(date = seq.Date(dstart, dend, by = "day"))
    })
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(c(date_all, data)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# 4. 공간 객체 변환 및 일별 농도 데이터 조인
sf_monitors_correct_daily <- sites_fullrange_daily |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    TMSID = as.character(TMSID),
    TMSID2 = as.character(TMSID2)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(lon)) |>
  sf::st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326) |>
  sf::st_transform(5179) |>
  # 일별 농도 데이터와 병합
  dplyr::full_join(
    ak_sites_daily,
    by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "date")
  ) |>
  # 기하 정보가 있는 행만 유지 (운영 기간 내 데이터)
  dplyr::filter(!sf::st_is_empty(geometry)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(year = lubridate::year(date)) |>
  dplyr::filter(year >= 2010) |>
  dplyr::relocate(
    any_of(c("date", "PM10", "PM25")),
    .after = TMSID2
  )


qs::qsave(
  sf_monitors_correct_daily, 
  file.path(save_path, "sf_monitors_correct_daily.qs"), 
  nthreads = 12
)
# sf_monitors_correct_daily <- qs::qread(
#   file.path(save_path, "sf_monitors_correct_daily.qs"), 
#   nthreads = 12
# )


# 5. 월별로 브랜칭
sf_monitors_correct_month <- lapply(chr_months_spatial, function(mon) {
  res <- sf_monitors_correct_daily |>
    dplyr::filter(format(date, "%Y-%m") == mon)
  return(res)
})
```


### aod_daily

```{r}
## [1] 병렬 처리 환경 설정 ####
plan(mirai_multisession, workers = 24)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 16000 * 1024^2) # 16GB

df_feat_correct_aod_daily <- future_lapply(chr_months_spatial, function(mon_str) {
  
  # 월별 날짜 시퀀스 생성
  mon_start    <- as.Date(paste0(mon_str, "-01"))
  mon_end      <- lubridate::rollback(mon_start + months(1))
  date_seq     <- seq(mon_start, mon_end, by = "day")
  date_pattern <- strftime(date_seq, "%Y%j")

  # 파일 경로 생성 및 존재 확인
  aod_files <- file.path(
    chr_dir_aod,
    paste0("MCD19A2_Daily_Composite_", date_pattern, ".tif")
  )
  valid_files <- aod_files[file.exists(aod_files)]
  
  if (length(valid_files) == 0) return(NULL)

  # 1. 원시 데이터 추출 (일별 루프)
  extracted_raw <- purrr::map_df(valid_files, function(file) {
    date_str     <- stringr::str_extract(basename(file), "\\d{7}")
    current_date <- as.Date(date_str, format = "%Y%j")
    
    # 해당 날짜 운영 측정소 필터링
    current_sf <- sf_monitors_correct |> 
      dplyr::filter(
        as.Date(date_start) <= current_date & 
        as.Date(date_end) >= current_date
      )
    
    if (nrow(current_sf) == 0) return(NULL)

    aod_ras <- terra::rast(file)
    ras_crs <- terra::crs(aod_ras)
    
    current_sf_buff <- current_sf |> 
      sf::st_transform(ras_crs) |> 
      sf::st_buffer(dist = 2000)

    extracted <- exactextractr::exact_extract(
      x = aod_ras,
      y = current_sf_buff,
      fun = "mean",
      force_df = TRUE,
      progress = FALSE
    )

    data.frame(
      TMSID  = current_sf$TMSID,
      TMSID2 = current_sf$TMSID2,
      date   = current_date,
      aod    = ifelse(is.nan(extracted$mean), NA, extracted$mean)
    )
  })

  # 2. 중복 제거 및 지점별/일별 평균 집계 (핵심 수정 사항)
  # 파일이 여러 개일 경우 발생하는 행 수 폭발 방지
  mon_res <- extracted_raw |>
    dplyr::group_by(TMSID, TMSID2, date) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      aod = mean(aod, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(aod = ifelse(is.nan(aod), NA, aod))
  
  return(mon_res)
  
}, future.packages = c("dplyr", "sf", "terra", "lubridate", "stringr", "purrr", "exactextractr"))

plan(sequential)
qs::qsave(
  df_feat_correct_aod_daily, 
  file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_aod_daily.qs"), 
  nthreads = 12
)
# df_feat_correct_aod_daily <- qs::qread(
#   file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_aod_daily.qs"), 
#   nthreads = 12
# )
```

### era5_land_daily

```{r}
## 1. 병렬 처리 환경 설정 ####
plan(mirai_multisession, workers = 24)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 16000 * 1024^2) # 16GB

df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily <- future_lapply(chr_months_spatial, function(mon_str) {
  
  curr_yr  <- substr(mon_str, 1, 4)
  curr_mon <- substr(mon_str, 6, 7)
  
  # 1. 파일 경로 확인
  zip_nc_path <- file.path(chr_dir_era5_land, 
                           paste0("ERA5_Land_", curr_yr, "_", curr_mon, ".nc"))
  
  if (!file.exists(zip_nc_path)) return(NULL)

  # 2. 임시 디렉터리 생성 (워커 간 충돌 방지)
  temp_sub <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("era5_target_", curr_yr, curr_mon, "_", sample(1e5, 1)))
  dir.create(temp_sub, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  res <- tryCatch({
    # 압축 해제 및 로드
    unzip(zip_nc_path, files = "data_0.nc", exdir = temp_sub)
    real_nc <- file.path(temp_sub, "data_0.nc")
    if (!file.exists(real_nc)) return(NULL)
    
    r_full <- terra::rast(real_nc)
    
    # 시간축 설정 (UTC -> KST)
    # ERA5-Land NC는 보통 6개 변수가 시간순으로 쌓여 있음
    n_lyr_per_var <- terra::nlyr(r_full) / 6
    start_utc      <- as.POSIXct(paste0(mon_str, "-01 00:00:00"), tz = "UTC")
    time_seq_utc   <- seq(from = start_utc, by = "hour", length.out = n_lyr_per_var)
    date_kst       <- as.Date(time_seq_utc, tz = "Asia/Seoul")
    unique_dates   <- sort(unique(date_kst))

    # 변수별 집계 함수 정의
    v_mean <- c("t2m", "u10", "v10", "sp") # 평균: 기온, 풍속u, 풍속v, 기압
    v_sum  <- c("ssr", "tp")               # 합계: 일사량, 강수량
    
    daily_list <- list()
    for (v in c(v_mean, v_sum)) {
      idx <- grep(v, names(r_full))
      if (length(idx) == 0) next
      agg_fun <- if (v %in% v_mean) "mean" else "sum"
      
      # tapp()를 이용한 일별 재집계
      daily_list[[v]] <- terra::tapp(r_full[[idx]], 
                                     index = date_kst[1:length(idx)], 
                                     fun = agg_fun, 
                                     na.rm = TRUE)
    }

    # 해당 연도 측정소 추출 및 버퍼 생성 (2km)
    current_sf <- sf_monitors_correct |> 
      dplyr::filter(year == as.integer(curr_yr))
    
    s_buff <- current_sf |> 
      sf::st_transform(terra::crs(r_full)) |> 
      sf::st_buffer(dist = 2000)

    # 3. 각 변수별 공간 추출 및 데이터 정리
    feat_list <- lapply(names(daily_list), function(v_name) {
      ext <- exactextractr::exact_extract(daily_list[[v_name]], s_buff, 
                                          fun = "mean", force_df = TRUE, progress = FALSE)
      
      if (nrow(ext) == 0) return(NULL)
      
      ext |>
        dplyr::mutate(TMSID = current_sf$TMSID, TMSID2 = current_sf$TMSID2) |>
        tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = dplyr::starts_with("mean"), 
                            names_to = "discard", 
                            values_to = v_name) |>
        dplyr::group_by(TMSID, TMSID2) |>
        dplyr::mutate(date = unique_dates[1:dplyr::n()]) |>
        dplyr::ungroup() |>
        dplyr::select(TMSID, TMSID2, date, dplyr::all_of(v_name))
    })
    
    # 유효한 피처들만 조인
    feat_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), feat_list)
    if (length(feat_list) == 0) return(NULL)

    final_mon <- Reduce(function(x, y) dplyr::left_join(x, y, by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "date")), feat_list) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        across(any_of("t2m"), ~ .x - 273.15) # Kelvin to Celsius
      ) |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(date))
    
    return(final_mon)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Error in Month", mon_str, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  }, finally = {
    # 임시 NC 파일 삭제 (디스크 공간 확보)
    unlink(temp_sub, recursive = TRUE)
  })
  
  return(res)
  
}, future.packages = c("dplyr", "sf", "terra", "lubridate", "tidyr", "purrr", "exactextractr"))


# 작업 완료 후 플랜 초기화
plan(sequential)
qs::qsave(
  df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily, 
  file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily.qs"), 
  nthreads = 12
)
# df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily <- qs::qread(
#   file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily.qs"), 
#   nthreads = 12
# )
```

### era5_blh_daily

```{r}
## 1. 병렬 처리 환경 설정 ####
plan(mirai_multisession, workers = 24)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 16000 * 1024^2) # 16GB

df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily <- future_lapply(chr_months_spatial, function(mon_str) {
  
  curr_yr  <- substr(mon_str, 1, 4)
  curr_mon <- substr(mon_str, 6, 7)
  nc_path  <- file.path(chr_dir_era5_blh, 
                        paste0("ERA5_BLH_", curr_yr, "_", curr_mon, ".nc"))

  if (!file.exists(nc_path)) return(NULL) # NULL 반환하여 리스트 구조 유지
  
  res <- tryCatch({
    # Raster 로드
    r_full <- terra::rast(nc_path)

    # 시간축 설정 (UTC -> KST)
    start_utc    <- as.POSIXct(paste0(mon_str, "-01 00:00:00"), tz = "UTC")
    time_seq_utc <- seq(from = start_utc, by = "hour", length.out = terra::nlyr(r_full))
    date_kst     <- as.Date(time_seq_utc, tz = "Asia/Seoul")
    unique_dates <- sort(unique(date_kst))

    # 일평균 계산 (tapp)
    r_daily <- terra::tapp(r_full, 
                           index = date_kst[1:terra::nlyr(r_full)], 
                           fun = "mean", 
                           na.rm = TRUE)

    # 측정소 필터링 및 버퍼(2km)
    current_sf <- sf_monitors_correct |> 
      dplyr::filter(year == as.integer(curr_yr))
    
    s_buff <- current_sf |> 
      sf::st_transform(terra::crs(r_full)) |> 
      sf::st_buffer(dist = 2000)

    # 공간 추출
    ext <- exactextractr::exact_extract(r_daily, s_buff, 
                                        fun = "mean", force_df = TRUE, progress = FALSE)
    
    # 데이터 정리
    final_mon <- ext |>
      dplyr::mutate(TMSID = current_sf$TMSID, TMSID2 = current_sf$TMSID2) |>
      tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("mean"), 
                          names_to = "discard", 
                          values_to = "blh") |>
      dplyr::group_by(TMSID, TMSID2) |>
      dplyr::mutate(date = unique_dates[1:dplyr::n()]) |>
      dplyr::ungroup() |>
      dplyr::select(TMSID, TMSID2, date, blh) |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(date))
    
    return(final_mon)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Error in BLH branch", mon_str, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  return(res)
  
}, future.packages = c("dplyr", "sf", "terra", "lubridate", "tidyr", "exactextractr"))

plan(sequential)
qs::qsave(
  df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily, 
  file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily.qs"), 
  nthreads = 12
)
# df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily <- qs::qread(
#   file.path(save_path, "df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily.qs"), 
#   nthreads = 12
# )
```

### merged

```{r}
sf_monitors_correct_month # 모든 column
df_feat_correct_merged # d_road, dem, dsm, gw_emission, landuse_*, mtpi, mtpi_1km
df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily # t2m, u10, v10, sp, ssr, tp
df_feat_correct_aod_daily # aod
df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily # blh
```


```{r}
sf_monitors_correct[c("TMSID","TMSID2","ndays")]
```

```{r}
df_feat_correct_merged_daily <- lapply(seq_along(chr_months_spatial), function(i) {
  
  curr_mon_str <- chr_months_spatial[i] # "2017-01" 등
  curr_yr <- as.numeric(substr(curr_mon_str, 1, 4))
  
  # 1. 기준 데이터 추출 (관측 농도 리스트)
  base_data <- sf_monitors_correct_month[[i]]
  if (is.null(base_data) || nrow(base_data) == 0) return(NULL)

  # 2. Daily 변수 순차 병합 (NULL 체크 로직 강화)
  res_daily <- base_data %>% dplyr::mutate(year = curr_yr)

  # ERA5 Land Daily 조인
  if (!is.null(df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily[[i]])) {
    res_daily <- res_daily %>% 
      dplyr::left_join(df_feat_correct_era5_land_daily[[i]], by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "date"))
  }

  # AOD Daily 조인
  if (!is.null(df_feat_correct_aod_daily[[i]])) {
    res_daily <- res_daily %>% 
      dplyr::left_join(df_feat_correct_aod_daily[[i]], by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "date"))
  }

  # ERA5 BLH Daily 조인
  if (!is.null(df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily[[i]])) {
    res_daily <- res_daily %>% 
      dplyr::left_join(df_feat_correct_era5_blh_daily[[i]], by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "date"))
  }

  # 3. 연도별 환경 피처 병합 (9개 연도 리스트 대응)
  yearly_idx <- which(sapply(df_feat_correct_merged, function(x) any(x$year == curr_yr)))
  
  if (length(yearly_idx) > 0) {
    static_feat <- df_feat_correct_merged[[yearly_idx[1]]] %>%
      dplyr::select(
        TMSID, TMSID2, year,
        d_road, dem, dsm, gw_emission, 
        starts_with("landuse_"), 
        mtpi, mtpi_1km
      )
    
    res_daily <- res_daily %>% 
      dplyr::left_join(static_feat, by = c("TMSID", "TMSID2", "year"))
  }

  # 4. 공간 속성 제거 후 반환
  return(res_daily %>% sf::st_drop_geometry())
})

# 리스트 이름 부여 및 NULL 결과 제거
names(df_feat_correct_merged_daily) <- chr_months_spatial
df_feat_correct_merged_daily <- Filter(Negate(is.null), df_feat_correct_merged_daily)
```
